framework.name: Agency and Liability Confusion
framework.description: The introduction of AI agents creates novel legal and accountability challenges when purchase decisions are made by 'synthetic characters' rather than humans, potentially leading to unpredictable legal outcomes.
framework.raw_quote: how do we get unpredictable legal results when there's when something goes wrong and the buying decision was that of this synthetic character a new arguably a new type of entity

source.title: The Race to Standardize Agentic Commerce
